C:\Users\kiran\AppData\Local\Packages\PythonSoftwareFoundation.Python.3.13_qbz5n2kfra8p0\LocalCache\local-packages\Python313\site-packages\cmake\data\bin\cmake.exe -E rm -f CMakeFiles\build_index.dir/objects.a
C:\msys64\mingw64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\build_index.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\build_index.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\msys64\mingw64\bin\g++.exe  -static-libgcc -static-libstdc++ -O3 -march=native -DNDEBUG -static -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\build_index.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o build_index.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libbuild_index.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\build_index.dir\linkLibs.rsp
